MODULE: cosmos.core.environment
FILE: cosmos/core/environment.py (805 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Environment Awareness

"Good news, everyone! I now know exactly where and what I'm running on!"

Comprehensive environment detection, terminal awareness, and context tracking.

CLASSES:
- TerminalType(Enum): Types of terminals/shells.
- OSType(Enum): Operating system types.
- ContainerType(Enum): Container environment types.
- CloudProvider(Enum): Cloud provider types.
- SystemInfo: System information.
- TerminalInfo: Terminal/shell information.
- ContainerInfo: Container environment information.
- CloudInfo: Cloud environment information.
- NetworkInfo: Network environment information.
- EnvironmentContext: Complete environment context.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- EnvironmentDetector: Comprehensive environment detection.

Detects:
- Operating system and version
- 
  Methods: def context(self) -> EnvironmentContext
  Methods: def detect(self, force_refresh: bool=False) -> EnvironmentContext
  Methods: def get_summary(self) -> str
  Methods: def refresh(self) -> EnvironmentContext
  Methods: def adapt_output(self, text: str) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_environment() -> EnvironmentContext
- def get_environment_summary() -> str
- def adapt_for_terminal(text: str) -> str
